title: Cinema
description: Modpack for working cinema in Minecraft
body:
### A simple modpack for watch media inside the game. 

![Look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba7ef022117fd15848fa91116c63c18f3c702dac_0.webp)

Great if you want to watch something with friends but you get bored with a simple Discord stream

![Rick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8e1ca3287bf73598549db59b587e7f0adfd3464_0.webp)

And you can use emotes of your favorite Twitch streamers.

![Emotes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a035e325c60e2d9c829c346fdb0a6af355b337bb.gif)

### How to use:
- Place the Frame, Projector, or Television
- Press Shift+RMB to configure settings
- For added convenience, Shift+RMB while holding the "Remote Control" to control playback remotely.
- To avoid unnecessary client desync issues, wait until everyone is connected to the server and close to the screen.
- Enjoy!
(A list of supported sites can be found on the [WATERFrAMES](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes) page. Jellyfin stream URL is also supported.)


If you're too lazy to build everything, you can download a ready-made map from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/cinema-6000252/).
